evidence_summary: Establish a high-stakes crossing of a wide ditch using a makeshift tree bridge. The sequence must transition from the mechanical labor of construction to a chaotic, handheld combat encounter with Kalidahs, concluding with a decisive structural destruction t...

The group reaches a second ditch too wide for the Lion to jump. The Woodman chops a tree to create a bridge. As they cross, Kalidahs attack. To save the group, the Scarecrow directs the Woodman to chop the bridge, dropping the monsters into the abyss.
The group stands at the edge of a wide, impassable ditch.
The group is safe on the far side; the bridge and monsters are in the abyss.
Constructing a bridge, crossing under attack, and destroying the bridge to eliminate threats.
